summary: Code review completed for Inventory UI alignment. All 8 requested features verified in code. UI testing via Playwright blocked by session persistence issues - user session switches between 'Admin User' and 'User' accounts unexpectedly, causing LINKED APPS section to disappear and direct navigation to /inventory routes to fail with 403 errors.

integration_issues.issue: User session switches unexpectedly between different accounts during Playwright navigation. When logged in as 'Admin User', sidebar shows LINKED APPS with Inventory. After navigation, session switches to 'User' account and LINKED APPS disappears.

Inventory_Items_page_with_Item_Type_filt.details: Item Type filter with All, Products, Raw Materials chips implemented. Filter state at line 141, filter logic at line 698

Inventory_Locations_page_ecosystem_layou.details: Uses PageHeader (line 240), PageStatsRow (line 251), PageSearchBar (line 256), PageTableCard (line 263). Empty state configured properly.

Inventory_Transfers_page_ecosystem_layou.details: Uses PageHeader (line 263), PageStatsRow (line 274), PageSearchBar (line 279), PageFiltersRow (line 285), PageTableCard (line 293). Empty state configured.

Inventory_Alerts_page_ecosystem_layout.details: Uses PageHeader (line 222), PageStatsRow (line 233), PageSearchBar (line 238), PageFiltersRow (line 243), PageTableCard (line 252). Empty state configured.

Add_Location_modal.details: ActionSheetModal with form fields: Location Name, Address (optional), Location Type (store/warehouse/office)

Item_Type_filter_functionality.details: Filter state with 'all' | 'product' | 'raw_material'. Products filtered by p.item_type === itemTypeFilter

PageHeader.features: title, subtitle, primaryAction with icon and label, data-testid='page-header-primary-action'

PageStatsRow.features: stats array with label, value, color, bgColor, icon

PageTableCard.features: columns, data, loading state, empty state with icon/title/subtitle, renderActions

critical_code_review_comments: All requested ecosystem components (PageHeader, PageStatsRow, PageSearchBar, PageFiltersRow, PageTableCard) are properly implemented and used
Item Type filter (All, Products, Raw Materials) correctly implemented with state and filter logic
Sidebar labels correctly show 'Items' (not 'Products'), 'Locations', 'Transfers', 'Low Stock Alerts'
All pages have proper Add/Create buttons via PageHeader primaryAction
Empty states are properly configured for all pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory UI alignment code review passed - all 8 features verified. Playwright UI testing blocked by session persistence issues (documented in iterations 26, 28, 29). The session switches between 'Admin User' and 'User' accounts during navigation, causing LINKED APPS section to appear/disappear. Direct navigation to /inventory/* routes returns 403. Recommend manual verification through the app UI.
rca_of_the_issue: Session persistence issue in Playwright test environment - authentication state not maintained correctly across navigations. Previous iterations (26, 28) documented same issue. Session switches between different user accounts (Admin User vs User) unexpectedly.
